overview.description: Comprehensive guide for generating AVNI implementation bundles from SRS documents, Modelling Excel, Forms Excel, and Location PDF

modellingExcel.description: Contains Subject Types, Programs, Encounters, Program Encounters sheets

criticalSheets.name: Subject Types
criticalSheets.notes: Person type is for actual people (beneficiaries), Individual type is for entities (Anganwadi, School)

criticalSheets.name: Programs
criticalSheets.notes: Programs are linked to specific subject types

criticalSheets.name: Encounters
criticalSheets.notes: General encounters NOT linked to any program

criticalSheets.name: Program Encounters
criticalSheets.notes: Encounters that occur within a program context

criticalChecks: Verify Subject Type column for each encounter - don't assume based on encounter name
Cross-reference encounter types with the correct subject type
Check if 'User' subject type exists for staff-only forms like Leave form

formsExcel.description: Contains detailed form field specifications in multiple sheets
criticalChecks: Count all fields in each sheet and verify against generated form
Check for skip logic conditions in dedicated column
Verify data types match AVNI supported types
Look for form element groups (sections) within form sheets

locationPDF.description: Contains location hierarchy and all locations
criticalChecks: Check for duplicate names with different parents (e.g., Krishnapudhur in multiple blocks)

IndividualProfile.description: Registration form for a subject type

ProgramEnrolment.description: Form filled when enrolling into a program

ProgramExit.description: Form filled when exiting a program

Encounter.description: General encounter not linked to any program

Coded.description: Single or multi-select from predefined answers

singleValueCheck.description: Show field when another field has specific value

multipleValueCheck.description: Show field when another field has one of multiple values

containsCheck.description: For multi-select fields, check if contains a value

subjectTypeMapping.description: Mapping encounter to wrong subject type
subjectTypeMapping.example: Awareness Register mapped to Anganwadi instead of Beneficiary
subjectTypeMapping.prevention: Always verify Subject Type column in Modelling Excel Encounters sheet

missingFields.description: Not including all fields from Forms Excel
missingFields.example: Indent Register missing Total Distributed and Total Pending fields
missingFields.prevention: Count fields in Forms Excel sheet and verify against generated form

missingSkipRules.description: Not implementing skip logic from Forms Excel
missingSkipRules.example: Guardian fields showing for all beneficiary types instead of only School Students and Child
missingSkipRules.prevention: Check Skip Logic column in Forms Excel for each field

wrongFormElementType.example: Date field with type SingleSelect instead of appropriate type
wrongFormElementType.prevention: Match form element type to data type (Subject type needs Subject element type)

missingKeyValues.description: Not including required keyValues for certain data types
missingKeyValues.example: Location field missing lowestAddressLevelTypeUUIDs, Subject field missing subjectTypeUUID
missingKeyValues.prevention: Check data type requirements and add appropriate keyValues

wrongUUIDReferences.example: Address field referencing wrong addressLevelType UUID
wrongUUIDReferences.prevention: Cross-reference all UUIDs against addressLevelTypes.json, subjectTypes.json etc.

IndividualProfile.notes: No program or encounter type needed

ProgramEncounterCancellation.notes: Same encounter type as the encounter being cancelled

Encounter.notes: No program needed - linked directly to subject type

uuidPatterns.description: Consistent UUID generation pattern for readability

subjectTypes: All subject types from Modelling Excel present
programs: All programs from Modelling Excel present
encounterTypes: All encounters and program encounters present
forms: All fields from Forms Excel present
Form element groups match form sections
keyValues present for Subject, Location types
formMappings: Each form mapped to correct subject type
Program forms mapped to correct program
Encounter forms mapped to correct encounter type
locations: All locations from Location PDF present
concepts: All concepts for form fields created
Answer UUIDs are unique and consistent

formGroupRules.description: Rules for form element groups showing/hiding
formGroupRules.placement: Rule goes on formElementGroup, not individual elements

cancellationForms.description: Every schedulable encounter needs a cancellation form

bestPractices: Generate UUIDs consistently using org-specific prefix
Cross-reference all source documents before generating
Verify field counts match between source and generated
Test skip logic rules syntax before including
Include all keyValues for special data types
Create cancellation forms for schedulable encounters
Verify location hierarchy matches PDF exactly
Check for duplicate concept names and merge appropriately
